titleStmt.title: SII 23.116: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 116. (A.R. No. 116 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kośakkuḍi-Perumāḷ temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is a damaged inscription dated in Kollam 613, Mārgaḻi 8. It records an endowment of two mā of land made to the temple of Periya-Pirāṉ at Madiṭkuṟichchi in Muḷḷi-nāḍu evidently by the then ruler, while he was staying in his ‘new’ residence at Tirunelvēli in Kīḻvēmbu-nāḍu, to provide for the daily service in the temple called the Vīrakēraḷaṉ-śandi (after the donor). It gives the details of distribution of the rice after the offering among the several members of the temple establishment.
The Kollam year 613 corresponds to Śaka 1359 and A.D. 1437-38.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aruḷicceyal muḷḷināṭṭu matiṭkuṟicciyil nayiṉār periyapirāṉ koyilil tāṉattāril namaccivāyanayināru
m poliya niṉṟār vattaṉārum Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku meṟpaṭi nāṭṭu matiṭkuṟicciyil nayiṉār periyapirāṉukku
virakeraḷaṉcantiyākap paṭiyiṟ yam naṭantu potumpaṭi kaṟpittu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi Aññāḻi
vum kaṟiyamutu Eri karumpu Uṭpaṭṭavakaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu nāḻi yākavum naṭantu potumpaṭi kaṟpit
ta vakaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷiṉa picātam Aññāḻi yil nāḷ Oṉṟukku kāram poru tampirāṉum
nāḻi Uriyākavum nampu paṟṟaikkaraicar Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picātam nāḻi Ākavum pāca taṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picā
tam Uḻakkākavum tiru nāḷ Oṉṟukku picātam Uḻakkākavum Uvacca ṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picātam Uḻakkākavum
Emperumāṉ Aṭiyāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picātam Uḻakkākavum mutaṟkuṭi maṇavāḷa nācciyāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picā
tam Irunāḻiyākavum paṟṟip pūcai naṭattik koṇṭu potumpaṭi kaṟ pitta vakaikku 6 100 10 3varuṣam pacāṉ mutalukku tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamāka
viṭṭukkuṭutta rājarājavā maṅkalam teṉ paṟṟu vaṭakku c cey
Iraṇṭāntaramum c cey Iraṇṭāntaramum Āka 2 10 Itil taṟkuṟi Uma puravu Āka
Innilam Iraṇṭumāvukkum mutalām mutalkoṇṭu kaṟpitta vakaip paṭiye pūcai naṭattap picātam paṟṟikkoṇṭu potumpaṭi kollam
6 100 10 3varuṣam mārkaḻi ṭṭa 8 tiyati kiḻvempunāṭṭu tirunelveliyil putiya yiṭattu nām viṭāyirukka kaṟpittom tāṅkaḷum Immaricātiyile Ittaravu piṭipāṭāka
Innilam Iraṇṭu māvum cantirātittaval celvatāka kalveṭṭi kaiy yāṇṭuṅ koṇṭu kaṟpitta vakaippaṭi pūcaiyai naṭattip picātamum paṟṟi
k koṇṭu potumpaṭi kaṟpittamaikku Itu tā Ippaṭi kaṇakku cuntaravikkiramaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
